prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle portrait photo of an adult East Asian woman in her twenties lounging on a white bed in a warm modern bedroom, leaning forward on one elbow with her chin resting on her hand. She has long slightly messy dark brown hair falling around her shoulders and wears an oversized loose white button-up shirt with an open collar and soft natural folds. The scene should feel intimate but tasteful, with white bedding in the foreground, a wooden headboard behind her, a bedside table with a lamp on the left, and sheer curtains diffusing daylight from a window. Use shallow depth of field, soft morning light, warm neutral tones, natural skin texture, and a high-end editorial photography style. Add one solid rectangular censor block over the face, centered from forehead to mouth, in a muted tan-brown color, with sharp edges and no text. Vertical 4:5 composition, medium close-up from slightly above bed level, realistic camera perspective, no extra people, no watermark, no visible text.
